label: Backstory
description: Defines a pawn childhood or adulthood backstory, including title text, skill offsets, work restrictions, traits, spawn categories, and starting possessions.

baseDesc.label: Base description
baseDesc.description: Fallback description used when no translated description is available. Loaded during PostLoad as a source for the inherited description field.

identifier.label: Identifier
identifier.description: Legacy identifier used by old translation paths. Not translated. Installed data uses this on 600 of 845 backstories.

slot.label: Slot
slot.description: Whether this backstory occupies the Childhood or Adulthood slot on a pawn.

title.label: Title
title.description: Short title shown as the backstory name. Required by the game for config validation. Supports translation keys.

titleFemale.label: Title (female)
titleFemale.description: Female-specific title override. Falls back to title when absent. Supports translation keys.

titleShort.label: Title (short)
titleShort.description: Abbreviated title shown in compact UI contexts. Required by the game for config validation. Supports translation keys.

titleShortFemale.label: Title short (female)
titleShortFemale.description: Female-specific short title override. Falls back to titleShort then title when absent. Supports translation keys.

skillGains.label: Skill gains
skillGains.description: Skill level adjustments applied when this backstory is assigned to a pawn. Child element names are SkillDef defNames; text is the integer offset (may be negative).

workDisables.label: Work disables
workDisables.description: Work tag flags that this backstory permanently disables on the pawn. Each flag is a separate li child element.

requiredWorkTags.label: Required work tags
requiredWorkTags.description: Work tag flags that must be enabled for the pawn to receive this backstory during random generation. Each flag is a separate li child element.

spawnCategories.label: Spawn categories
spawnCategories.description: String category tags controlling which random backstory pools include this entry. Common values include Offworld, Pirate, Child, ImperialFighter. Open-ended; mods may add new categories.

bodyTypeGlobal.label: Body type (global)
bodyTypeGlobal.description: BodyTypeDef applied regardless of pawn gender. Overrides the gender-specific body type fields when set.

bodyTypeFemale.label: Body type (female)
bodyTypeFemale.description: BodyTypeDef applied to female pawns when bodyTypeGlobal is not set.

bodyTypeMale.label: Body type (male)
bodyTypeMale.description: BodyTypeDef applied to male and gender-unspecified pawns when bodyTypeGlobal is not set.

forcedTraits.label: Forced traits
forcedTraits.description: Traits always given to pawns with this backstory. Child element names are TraitDef defNames; text is the integer degree (defaults to 0 when omitted). Duplicate trait entries are allowed for different degrees.

disallowedTraits.label: Disallowed traits
disallowedTraits.description: Traits that cannot be randomly assigned alongside this backstory. Child element names are TraitDef defNames; text is the integer degree (defaults to 0 when omitted). Duplicate trait entries are allowed for different degrees.

nameMaker.label: Name maker
nameMaker.description: RulePackDef used to generate pawn names for pawns with this backstory.

possessions.label: Possessions
possessions.description: Items given to pawns with this backstory when spawned. Child element names are ThingDef defNames; text is an IntRange count (defaults to 1~1 when omitted). Entries may include MayRequire or MayRequireAnyOf attributes.

shuffleable.label: Shuffleable
shuffleable.description: Whether this backstory can be randomly assigned during pawn generation. Set to false for named/solid backstories that should only be assigned explicitly.

requiresSpawnCategory.label: Requires spawn category
requiresSpawnCategory.description: If true, this backstory is only assigned to pawns whose spawn category matches one of the spawnCategories entries.
